description_long: This surveillance camera features a rectangular, boxy housing with a sleek black and light blue color scheme. The front face is dominated by a large, circular lens encased in a black ring, suggesting a focus on high-quality imaging. The sides of the camera display angular, geometric accents and the right side is labeled with the text 'watcher 90', indicating a possible model or series. The rear of the camera is marked with 'L tech', hinting at the manufacturer or technology used. The camera is mounted on a robust, angular bracket designed for attachment to vertical surfaces, providing stability and adjustability. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments where both function and deterrence are important.
description: A modern, box-shaped surveillance camera with a prominent circular lens, black and light blue accents, and side labeling, mounted on a sturdy bracket.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large circular lens and the rectangular housing with light blue trim.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the 'watcher 90' label and the angular mounting bracket.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the 'L tech' marking and the back panel of the camera.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the geometric design and the mounting bracket without any visible labeling.
